page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. The system features 64 physical cores with a single thread per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB per core.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its bundled local storage, consisting of 15,358 GB of SSD capacity. This local storage is integrated directly into the host, offering high-capacity, low-latency data access. Additionally, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 160 Gbps, managed via a KVM hypervisor. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

The hardware profile of the ecs.i5.16xlarge offers high resource density, particularly in terms of local SSD storage and dedicated CPU cores. This makes it a qualitatively cost-effective option for workloads requiring massive local storage capacity combined with high memory and compute resources, without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads include large-scale relational databases, NoSQL databases, data warehousing, and high-throughput storage-bound applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.16xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance designed for storage-intensive and memory-heavy workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor, it features 64 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio running at 3.4 GHz, alongside 512.0 GB of RAM. The instance is equipped with 15,358 GB of local SSD storage, providing high-capacity, low-latency data access directly on the host. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 160 Gbps under a KVM hypervisor. With 8.0 GB of memory per core and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance delivers consistent performance without hyperthreading overhead. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and high-throughput storage applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5.16xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server featuring 64 Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, 15,358 GB of local SSD storage, and 160 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for storage-heavy workloads.

tagline: A dedicated high-capacity storage and memory instance featuring sixty-four physical cores and over fifteen terabytes of local SSD capacity.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz without hyperthreading.
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core.
15,358 GB of high-capacity local SSD storage.
Optimized for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and storage-heavy workloads.
